content.text:
All changes are clean. Here's a summary of everything fixed:

**PR review fixes (from CodeRabbit):**
- `BranchSelector.tsx` — added `aria-label="Search branches"` for accessibility
- `HomeView.tsx` — mobile repo picker now shows `abbreviatePath(repo.root_path)` to disambiguate repos with the same name

**Mobile width/overflow fixes (6 files):**

| File | Fix | Why |
|---|---|---|
| `MobileLayout.tsx` | Added `overflow-x-hidden` to code panel scroll container | Prevented horizontal scroll when diff content overflows |
| `AllFilesDiffViewer.tsx` | Added `overflow-x-hidden` to scroll container | Prevented diff sections from expanding horizontally |
| `DiffViewer.tsx` | Added `overflow-hidden` to embedded container | Contained Shadow DOM (FileDiff) from expanding beyond parent |
| `diffOptions.ts` | Force `unified` diff mode on mobile | Split-view columns overflow on <768px screens |
| `global.css` | Added `max-width: 100%` to `diffs-container` | Prevented pierre/diffs Shadow DOM from exceeding parent width |
| `ToolGroupBlock.tsx` | Added `min-w-0` to root flex container | Allowed flex shrinking below content width |
| `BaseToolRenderer.tsx` | Added `min-w-0` to expanded content wrapper | Prevented tool output from overflowing on narrow screens |
